entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Career coach in a long-running coaching relationship with Daniel; warm, candid, systems-oriented style

entities.name: Daniel
entities.context: Coaching client wrestling with guilt and avoidance during a job search; sees parallels between his hesitation and his father's story

entities.name: Daniel's Father
entities.context: Referenced as having a story that echoes in Daniel's own hesitation around job search

entities.name: Warm Collegial Coaching Style
entities.context: V's tone described as warm, collegial, candid—peer-like with room for jokes, swearing, and vulnerability

entities.name: Supportive but Unsentimental Coaching
entities.context: V acknowledges exhaustion and demoralization while pushing toward concrete optimizations and action

entities.name: Systems-Oriented Reflection
entities.context: Both V and Daniel naturally analyze patterns: family history, internal dynamics, and hiring system structures

entities.name: Tiger Parent Dynamics
entities.context: Internal psychological pattern Daniel and V analyze as influencing Daniel's behavior and avoidance

entities.name: Cost of Staying in Limbo
entities.context: V names the cost of inaction/avoidance as part of his coaching approach with Daniel

entities.name: Hiring Systems
entities.context: Structural systems both participants analyze as part of understanding job search optimization

entities.name: B07 – Tone and Context
entities.context: A coaching call between V and Daniel documented as session B07

relationships.context: Long-running coaching relationship; V pushes Daniel toward concrete optimizations during job search
Daniel sees his father's story echoing in his own hesitation and avoidance patterns
V's default coaching tone is warm, collegial, candid with room for vulnerability
V normalizes emotional reactions while naming the cost of inaction
V naturally analyzes patterns in family history, psychology, and hiring structures
Daniel wrestles with internalized tiger parent dynamics influencing his job search behavior
Daniel is in a state of guilt and avoidance; V names the cost of this limbo
V analyzes the structure of hiring systems as part of coaching methodology
